# Enan Srivastava

> Personal site of Enan Srivastava — Senior AI Engineer and data scientist based in Chicago, IL, USA. The homepage (https://enan.rocks/) is an interactive terminal-style portfolio; this file summarizes its content for language models and AI agents.

Canonical domain: https://enan.rocks/ (https://enan.dev/ redirects here).

## Who is Enan Srivastava

- Senior AI Engineer building production AI/ML systems (Python, AWS, GCP, PyTorch, LLMs)
- Chief Operating Officer, A Cubed Designs — business operations, design thinking, delivery
- Founder/operator of Constult Consulting (https://constult.consulting/) — strategy, data science, development, and operations consulting
- Server admin/owner, AIM Lab — infrastructure and research computing
- Data science mentor, The Erdős Institute — mentoring data science cohorts and curriculum
- Alumnus of The Ohio State University

## Skills

- Languages: Python, Java, JavaScript, SQL, R, Bash, HTML/CSS
- Cloud: AWS, GCP, Firebase
- ML/AI: PyTorch, LLMs, TensorFlow, scikit-learn
- Tools: Docker, Linux, CI/CD, Node.js, R Shiny, Git
- Business: design thinking, business management, insurance, nonprofit consulting
